div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 01-Feb 2024
This value set expansion contains 55 concepts.

tr.td: Referred to acute chest pain clinic
Referral to rapid access chest pain clinic
Referral to soft tissue injury clinic (procedure)
Referral to sexually transmitted infections clinic (procedure)
Referral to diabetes preconception counseling clinic
Referral to deep vein thrombosis clinic (procedure)
Referral to transient ischemic attack clinic
Referral to breastfeeding education class during prenatal period (procedure)
Referral to community diabetes antenatal clinic
Referral to hospital diabetes antenatal clinic (procedure)
Wellness health education, guidance, and counseling

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 01-Feb 2024
This value set expansion contains 135 concepts.

tr.td: Maternal diabetes mellitus with hypoglycemia affecting fetus OR newborn
Diabetes mellitus associated with genetic syndrome
Insulin dependent diabetes mellitus type IA
Extreme insulin resistance with acanthosis nigricans, hirsutism AND abnormal insulin receptors
Insulin dependent diabetes mellitus type IB
Pineal hyperplasia AND diabetes mellitus syndrome
Diabetes mellitus associated with receptor abnormality
Diabetes mellitus associated with pancreatic disease
Diabetes mellitus associated with hormonal etiology
Diabetes mellitus caused by insulin receptor antibodies (disorder)
Diabetes mellitus in mother complicating pregnancy, childbirth AND/OR puerperium
Type I diabetes mellitus with ulcer
Type I diabetes mellitus maturity onset
Malnutrition-related diabetes mellitus with renal complications
Malnutrition-related diabetes mellitus with peripheral circulatory complications
Diabetes mellitus during pregnancy, childbirth and the puerperium
Insulin treated Type II diabetes mellitus
Diabetes mellitus autosomal dominant type II
Muscular atrophy, ataxia, retinitis pigmentosa, and diabetes mellitus
Photomyoclonus, diabetes mellitus, deafness, nephropathy and cerebral dysfunction
Megaloblastic anemia, thiamine-responsive, with diabetes mellitus and sensorineural deafness
Diabetes mellitus in neonate small for gestational age
Type I diabetes mellitus without complication
Diabetes mellitus induced by non-steroid drugs
Diabetes mellitus induced by non-steroid drugs without complication
Diabetes mellitus associated with cystic fibrosis
Latent autoimmune diabetes mellitus in adult (disorder)
Diabetes mellitus due to cystic fibrosis (disorder)
Type I diabetes mellitus well controlled
Type II diabetes mellitus well controlled
Maturity onset diabetes of the young, type 1 (disorder)
Pre-existing type 1 diabetes mellitus in pregnancy
Pre-existing type 2 diabetes mellitus in pregnancy
Diabetes mellitus due to genetic defect in beta cell function
Diabetes mellitus due to genetic defect in insulin action
Maturity-onset diabetes of the young, type 3 (disorder)
Maturity-onset diabetes of the young, type 4
Maturity-onset diabetes of the young, type 5 (disorder)
Maturity-onset diabetes of the young, type 6 (disorder)
Maturity-onset diabetes of the young, type 7
Maturity-onset diabetes of the young, type 9
Maturity-onset diabetes of the young, type 10 (disorder)
Maturity-onset diabetes of the young, type 11
Type I diabetes mellitus in remission (disorder)
Type II diabetes mellitus in remission (disorder)
Gingival disease co-occurrent with diabetes mellitus (disorder)
Atherosclerosis, deafness, diabetes, epilepsy, nephropathy syndrome (disorder)
Developmental delay, epilepsy, neonatal diabetes syndrome (disorder)
Pancreatic hypoplasia, diabetes mellitus, congenital heart disease syndrome (disorder)
Intellectual disability, craniofacial dysmorphism, hypogonadism, diabetes mellitus syndrome (disorder)
Permanent neonatal diabetes mellitus with cerebellar agenesis syndrome (disorder)
Primary microcephaly, mild intellectual disability, young-onset diabetes syndrome (disorder)
Primary microcephaly, epilepsy, permanent neonatal diabetes syndrome
Diabetes, hypogonadism, deafness, intellectual disability syndrome
Pre-existing malnutrition-related diabetes mellitus in pregnancy
Intrauterine growth restriction, short stature, early adult-onset diabetes syndrome
Juvenile-onset diabetes mellitus, central and peripheral neurodegeneration syndrome (disorder)
Disorder due to well controlled type 2 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
Diabetes mellitus due to pancreatic injury (disorder)
Pre-existing diabetes mellitus in mother complicating childbirth (disorder)
Type 2 diabetes mellitus controlled by diet
Disorder of nerve co-occurrent and due to type 1 diabetes mellitus (disorder)
Diabetes mellitus in mother complicating childbirth (disorder)

div.p: Expansion based on codesystem Medication Names For Pharmacy v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Chloral hydrate Oral Solution500mg / 5ml in 200ml Bottle
Paraldehyde Rectal Sol.10mL single dose unit
Ferrous Sulphate Tab. 200mg(60mg of Fe ion)
Ferrous Fumarate chewableTab. 100mg (33mg of Fe ion)
Magnesium Glycinate Tab 400mg(200mg of elemental Magnesium)
Prednisolone Acetate Eye drop1%,5mL Dropper Bot.
Atropine Sulphate Eye drops1%, 5mL-10mL Dropper Bot.
Tropicamide 0.8%+Phenylephrine HCl 5% Eye drops5mL-15mL Dropper Bot.
Moxifloxacin Preservative freeOphthalmic Sol. 0.5%5mL Dropper bott.
Cyclosporin Opthalmic emul.0.05% w/v, 5mL Dropper Bot.
Proparacaine HCl Ophthalmic Solution 0.5% in 5mL-15mLDropper Bot.
Brinzolamide10 mg/mL+Timolol Malete 5mg /mL, Eyedrop in 5mL Dropper Bot.
Docusate sodium Ear Drop0.5%,10mL Dropper Bot.
Xylometazoline Nasal Drops0.05%w/v in 10mL Dropper Bot.
Oxytetracyclin 3% and Hydrocortisone acetate 1%,15g Ointment Tube
Betamethasone 0.1%+ Neomycin 0.5% Eye/Ear/Nasal drops,5mL-7.5mL Dropper Bot.
Ciprofloxacin Ear drop0.3% w/v, 5mL Dropper Bot.
Sodium Citrate Oral Sol.500mg/334mg per 5mL ,100mL Bot

div.p: Expansion based on SNOMED CT International edition 01-Feb 2024

tr.td: Assessment of compliance with medication regimen
Relationship problems with family members due to medical condition
Suspected disease caused by 2019 novel coronavirus
Injury of unknown intent due to fall from height
Malignant tumor of male genital organ
Benign neoplasm of male genital organ
Congenital anomaly of male genital system
Complication of pregnancy, childbirth and/or puerperium
Acquired deformity of ankle AND/OR foot
Benign neoplasm of female genital organ
Risk factors present at heart disease screening
Congenital anomaly of the urinary tract
Benign hypertensive heart disease with congestive cardiac failure
Atherosclerosis of arteries of the extremities
Disorder of cornea associated with contact lens (disorder)
Fear of cancer of endocrine system (finding)
Primary malignant neoplasm of thyroid gland
Insulin dependent diabetes mellitus type IB
Disorder of teeth AND/OR supporting structures
Fear of having cancer of digestive system (finding)
Duodenal ulcer without hemorrhage, without perforation AND without obstruction
Fear of cancer of respiratory system (finding)
Lack or loss of sexual desire
Health promotion education, guidance, and counseling
